name: Kaymakli Kayisi (Cream-filled Apricots)
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the dried apricot halves in warm water for 2 hours to soften.
2. Drain the apricots and combine 2 cups of sugar, 1 cup of water, and half a lemon in a saucepan.
3. Cook over medium heat until the mixture reaches a syrupy consistency (225-230°F on a candy thermometer).
4. Add the soaked apricots to the saucepan and simmer for an additional 5 minutes.
5. Remove from heat and allow to cool completely.
6. Whip cream until stiff peaks form, then fold in 1 cup of slivered almonds.
7. Arrange the cooled apricot halves in a single layer on a serving dish, with the pits facing up.
8. Dollop the whipped cream mixture onto half of the apricots.
9. Cover the dollops with the remaining apricots to form sandwiches.
10. Sprinkle the remaining slivered almonds and pistachios over the top.
Makes about 75 servings using small dried apricots.
Each serving contains approximately: 61 calories; 2 milligrams sodium; 4 milligrams cholesterol; 3 grams fat; 10 grams carbohydrates; 1 gram protein; 0.24 grams fiber.
